summary: Comprehensive testing completed for LinguaFlow conversation agent. Backend APIs 100% functional with GPT-5.2 integration working correctly. Frontend nearly perfect with proper navigation, chat functionality, dashboard, and vocabulary management.

ui_bugs.issue: Delete button not visible on hover - may be CSS hover state issue

passed_tests: Backend API: All 10 endpoints (scenarios, conversations, messages, vocabulary, progress) - 100% success rate
Landing page: All sections loaded (hero, features, scenarios, CTA, footer)
Chat: Conversation creation, message sending, AI responses with 5-8s response time
Chat: Quick prompts, typing indicators, scenario selection working
Dashboard: Stats grid, tools usage, scenarios practiced, recent activity all loading
Vocabulary: Word addition via dialog, search functionality, empty state handling
AI Integration: GPT-5.2 responses with tools_used tracking working correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Vocabulary delete button hover visibility issue in CSS. Otherwise application is fully functional and ready for use.
